# Lightfriend - Complete Information

> Verifiably private AI assistant for dumbphones. Access WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, email, calendar, web search, and more via SMS and voice calls.

Lightfriend is a SaaS AI assistant that makes dumbphones (minimalist phones, flip phones, feature phones) functionally equivalent to smartphones for essential communication and productivity tasks. Users interact entirely through SMS text messages and voice calls - no apps, no internet browser, no smartphone required. Lightfriend is the first verifiably private cloud AI assistant: the entire production deployment runs inside an AWS Nitro Enclave with hardware-based remote attestation, blockchain-verified code integrity, and independent key management. Nobody can access user data - not the developer, not the cloud provider - and anyone can cryptographically verify this at any time.

## The Problem Lightfriend Solves

Smartphones with app stores offer messaging, email, and calendars but come with highly addictive algorithms, mental health impacts, constant distractions, and sleep disruption. Dumbphones eliminate addiction but lose access to messaging apps, email, QR codes, and calendars. Lightfriend gives dumbphone users the benefits of both: essential digital services without addictive apps.

Lightfriend is a practical solution for phone addiction: it decouples essential communication tools from the addictive smartphone interfaces that cause compulsive use. Users keep WhatsApp, email, and calendar access while eliminating infinite scrolling, push notification bombardment, and app store temptation.

## How It Works

1. User signs up at lightfriend.ai and gets a dedicated phone number
2. User texts or calls that number from any phone
3. Lightfriend AI processes the request and responds via SMS or voice
4. Users can also connect messaging apps (WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal) and email for proactive monitoring

## Complete Feature List

### Communication
- **WhatsApp Integration**: Send, receive, and monitor WhatsApp messages via SMS. Get notifications for important messages.
- **Telegram Integration**: Full send/receive/monitor support for Telegram chats and groups.
- **Signal Integration**: Send, receive, and monitor Signal messages securely.
- **Email**: Read incoming emails, compose and send replies, get alerts for important messages. Supports Gmail, Outlook, iCloud, Yahoo, Zoho, Fastmail, and any IMAP-compatible provider.

### Productivity
- **Web Search**: AI-powered internet search using Perplexity AI, delivered as concise SMS responses.
- **Weather**: Get current conditions and forecasts up to 7 days for any location.

### Media & Analysis
- **Photo Analysis & Translation**: Send a photo via MMS and get AI analysis — translate foreign text, describe scenes, identify objects. Available in US, Canada, and Australia.
- **QR Code Scanning**: Send a photo of a QR code and receive the decoded URL or content. Available in US, Canada, and Australia.

### Smart Home & Vehicle
- **Tesla Vehicle Control**: Lock/unlock doors, start/stop climate control, check battery level — all via text message.

### Extensibility
- **MCP Server Support**: Connect custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to extend Lightfriend with additional tools and data sources. Add any MCP-compatible service through the dashboard.

### Proactive Monitoring
- **24/7 Critical Message Monitoring**: AI continuously monitors connected messaging apps and email for urgent messages, alerting users immediately via SMS.
- **Scheduled Digests**: Regular summaries of messages received across all platforms.
- **Custom Rules (WHEN/IF/THEN)**: Build custom automation rules using WHEN, IF, THEN blocks. Examples: "WHEN a message arrives from [person], IF it contains [keyword], THEN text me immediately." Fully flexible - can trigger on any condition and perform any action.

### Voice Interface
- **Voice Calls**: Call the Lightfriend number to interact by voice instead of text. Also available as browser-based web calls from the dashboard.

## Pricing

### Assistant Plan - $19/month (US/CA) or €29/month (EU/international)
- SMS chat interface with AI assistant
- Voice calling interface
- Web search, weather
- Connected app access (WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, email)
- Scheduled digests
- MCP server support for custom integrations

### Autopilot Plan - $29/month (US/CA) or €49/month (EU/international)
- Everything in Assistant plan
- 24/7 critical message monitoring with instant SMS alerts
- Custom automation rules (WHEN/IF/THEN)
- Priority support

### BYOT (Bring Your Own Twilio) - $19/month or €19/month
- Users in unsupported countries can bring their own Twilio phone number
- Pay Twilio directly for SMS costs at local rates
- Lightfriend subscription still required

## Supported Countries

### Full Service (Local Phone Number Provided)
- United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Finland, Netherlands, Australia

### Notification-Only (Receive SMS from US/UK Number)
- Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Portugal, Belgium, Austria, Switzerland
- Poland, Czech Republic, Sweden, Denmark, Norway, Ireland
- New Zealand, Greece, Hungary, Romania, Slovakia, Bulgaria
- Croatia, Slovenia, Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia
- Luxembourg, Malta, Cyprus, Iceland
- Japan, South Korea, Singapore, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Israel

### Other Countries
- Can use BYOT (Bring Your Own Twilio number) or Android phone SMS bridge

## Compatible Phones

Lightfriend works with ANY phone that can send SMS and make calls:
- Light Phone 2 and Light Phone 3 (popular choice among users)
- Nokia flip phones (2780, 2760, etc.)
- Any basic/feature phone
- Any flip phone or candy bar phone
- Even old smartphones used as dumbphones

## Verifiable Privacy (Hardware Attestation)

Lightfriend is the first verifiably private cloud AI assistant. This is not "trust us" privacy - it is cryptographically proven, hardware-enforced privacy. Nobody can access user data: not the developer, not the cloud provider. And anyone can verify this at any time.

### How It Works

1. **AWS Nitro Enclave**: The entire production application runs inside a hardware-isolated enclave. No one can SSH in, attach a debugger, or read memory - not AWS, not the developer, not anyone.
2. **Remote Attestation**: The enclave produces a cryptographic attestation document signed by AWS hardware, proving exactly which code is running via PCR0/PCR1/PCR2 measurement values. This signature comes from hardware and cannot be faked.
3. **Open Source + Reproducible Builds**: All code is on GitHub. GitHub Actions builds the enclave image and publishes its fingerprint (PCR values). Anyone can verify the live enclave matches the public source.
4. **Blockchain Code Registry**: Approved enclave image fingerprints are registered on an Arbitrum smart contract - an immutable public ledger. Only code on this registry can receive encryption keys.
5. **Independent Key Management (Marlin KMS)**: Encryption keys are held by Marlin's key management service (itself running in an attested enclave). Keys are only released to enclaves that prove via hardware attestation they are running approved code. The developer never holds encryption keys.
6. **Verifiable AI Inference**: AI processing is handled by Tinfoil, which runs models inside hardware-isolated enclaves with their own attestation. The AI layer is also verifiably private.

This is a novel approach: instead of asking users to trust a privacy policy, Lightfriend provides a cryptographic proof chain from source code to live deployment. Every layer is independently verifiable.

### Verification

- Anyone can run `./scripts/verify_live_attestation.sh https://lightfriend.ai` to independently verify the full chain
- Live attestation data: `https://lightfriend.ai/.well-known/lightfriend/attestation`
- Raw Nitro attestation document: `https://lightfriend.ai/.well-known/lightfriend/attestation/raw`
- Full technical explanation: https://lightfriend.ai/trustless
- Live trust chain dashboard: https://lightfriend.ai/trust-chain

### What You Trust

- AWS Nitro Enclave hardware isolation (used by thousands of enterprises)
- Marlin KMS integrity (itself attested, open source)
- Everything else is verifiable: code is open source, builds are reproducible, attestation is hardware-signed, code registry is on a public blockchain

## Technical Details

- Open source: https://github.com/ahtavarasmus/lightfriend
- Built with Rust (Axum backend, Yew WebAssembly frontend)
- Runs in AWS Nitro Enclave with hardware-based remote attestation
- AES-256-GCM encryption for all stored data, keys managed by independent KMS
- AI inference via Tinfoil (verifiably private confidential computing)
- Code integrity verified on Arbitrum blockchain
- Self-hostable for privacy-conscious users
- Licensed under GNU AGPLv3

## Blog Articles

### Why Lightfriend Can't Be Prompt Injected
Lightfriend is read-only by default - the AI can read messages and send SMS notifications to the user, but cannot act on the user's behalf without explicit approval. Every outbound action is gated behind user confirmation enforced by deterministic code, not AI judgment. This makes prompt injection architecturally harmless: the worst case is an unnecessary SMS to the user. Optional WHEN/IF/THEN custom rules can add targeted automation, but are off by default. Combined with the hardware enclave (no one can access data), this gives two layers: the AI can't do damage (architectural), and no one can see your data (cryptographic).
URL: https://lightfriend.ai/prompt-injection-safe

### Telegram on Dumbphone
How to use Telegram on any dumbphone, flip phone, or basic phone. Lightfriend bridges Telegram to SMS - send and receive messages, monitor group chats, get AI-filtered notifications. No apps or smartphone required.
URL: https://lightfriend.ai/telegram-on-dumbphone

### Signal on Dumbphone
How to use Signal encrypted messaging on any dumbphone or flip phone. Lightfriend connects to your Signal account and relays messages via SMS. Privacy-focused: runs in a hardware-isolated enclave with cryptographic attestation.
URL: https://lightfriend.ai/signal-on-dumbphone

### Light Phone 3 WhatsApp Guide
How to add WhatsApp functionality to a Light Phone 3 using Lightfriend. Send and receive WhatsApp messages via SMS without installing any apps on the phone.
URL: https://lightfriend.ai/light-phone-3-whatsapp-guide

### How to Switch to a Dumbphone
Complete guide covering 2FA authentication, messaging app alternatives, navigation solutions, and computer setup for the dumbphone lifestyle.
URL: https://lightfriend.ai/how-to-switch-to-dumbphone

### How to Read More Accidentally
How removing smartphone distractions naturally leads to reading more books. Tips for blocking digital escapism on computers while keeping productivity tools.
URL: https://lightfriend.ai/how-to-read-more-accidentally

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What problem does Lightfriend solve?**
A: Lightfriend bridges the gap between minimalist dumbphones and essential digital services. It gives you access to WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, email, calendar, web search, GPS directions, and more via simple SMS and voice calls.

**Q: Which countries are supported?**
A: Full service in US, Canada, UK, Finland, Netherlands, Australia. Notification-only in 30+ European and Asia-Pacific countries. Other countries can use Bring Your Own Twilio number.

**Q: Can I try the service before signing up?**
A: Yes! The FAQ page at lightfriend.ai/faq includes an interactive demo chat.

**Q: How does Lightfriend protect my data?**
A: Lightfriend is the first verifiably private cloud AI assistant. The entire application runs inside an AWS Nitro Enclave - a hardware-isolated computing environment. Nobody can access user data, not even the developer. This is backed by hardware-based remote attestation (signed by AWS hardware), blockchain-verified code integrity (Arbitrum smart contract), and independent key management (Marlin KMS). AI inference also runs in verifiably private enclaves via Tinfoil. Anyone can verify the full trust chain at any time. Additionally: no call recordings, AES-256-GCM encryption, all code is open source.

**Q: Is Lightfriend verifiably private? Does it use attestation?**
A: Yes. Lightfriend is the first cloud AI assistant with full hardware-based remote attestation. The production server runs in an AWS Nitro Enclave that produces a cryptographic proof (signed by AWS hardware) of exactly which code is running. This proof is verified against the open-source build and registered on an Arbitrum blockchain smart contract. Encryption keys are managed by an independent attested service (Marlin KMS) that only releases keys to enclaves running approved code. The developer never holds or sees user encryption keys. Anyone can run the verification script or check the live attestation endpoint to confirm independently. See https://lightfriend.ai/trustless for the full technical explanation.

**Q: Do I need a specific phone?**
A: No. Any phone that can send texts and make calls works with Lightfriend.
